title: Graduate or Advanced Training Approval
desc: You need graduate school, professional school, or another advanced training path justified as necessary for suitable employment.
problemRouterLabel: I need graduate school or advanced training approved

fields.name: targetOccupation
fields.label: Target Occupation
fields.placeholder: e.g. Physician Assistant or Nurse Practitioner

fields.name: whyPriorTrainingFails
fields.label: Why prior degree or work is unsuitable
fields.placeholder: e.g. No realistic path to employment in current field

fields.name: licensureNeed
fields.label: Licensure or market requirement
fields.placeholder: e.g. State license or clinical credential needed

errors: Advanced-training disputes are often framed as personal preference instead of a necessity question tied to employability, licensure, and disability-compatible work.
Cost objections are weaker when the requested program is clearly linked to a specific occupation, credential, and realistic employment path.

evidenceChecklist.text: SOC, O*NET, or labor-market evidence linking the degree to the target occupation
Program map, prerequisites, or acceptance materials for the requested school
Licensure, certification, or employer requirement showing the training is necessary
Evidence that prior education or work no longer produces suitable employment
